text.hero.title: Two practices. One commitment to clarity.
text.hero.copy: Corbelle operates across two distinct but connected practices. They serve different needs, but draw on the same philosophy: technology decisions made well require independence, context, and a partner who has no interest in the outcome except getting it right.
text.overview1.title: Tech Consultancy
text.overview1.copy: For organisations facing significant technology decisions without the internal function to navigate them.
text.overview2.title: Executive Leadership Practice
text.overview2.copy: For individual executives personally responsible for high-stakes technology decisions.
text.tech.title: Tech Consultancy
text.tech.intro: Most technology problems in mid-market businesses are not technical problems. They are leadership problems wearing a technical costume.
text.tech.item1.title: Technology Reviews & Audits
text.tech.item1.copy: A structured assessment of the current technology landscape: what’s working, what isn’t, and what the business is actually spending its technology budget on. Delivered as a leadership-ready document, not a technical report.
text.tech.item2.title: AI Education & Readiness
text.tech.item2.copy: Not technical training, but the contextual understanding that allows executives to ask better questions, evaluate vendor claims, and make AI decisions with confidence rather than anxiety.
text.tech.item3.title: Operating Model Work
text.tech.item3.copy: When a business is growing, restructuring, or facing a step-change in complexity. Corbelle helps leadership teams design the technology relationship before it becomes a crisis.
text.tech.item4.title: Vendor & Proposal Review
text.tech.item4.copy: When a proposal lands on your desk and you need a genuinely independent assessment. No vendor relationships. No referral fees. Just the honest answer.
text.tech.fit1.label: Right fit
text.tech.fit1.copy: Leaders of sub-500 person businesses facing a significant technology decision who need someone to validate their direction, or challenge it, before committing.
text.tech.fit2.label: Not for
text.tech.fit2.copy: Businesses with a strong internal technology function, enterprise vendor-management processes, or a need for end-to-end implementation management.
text.leadership.title: Executive Leadership Practice
text.leadership.intro: Technology decisions are not just technical events. They are political ones. And most executives have no one they can be completely honest with.
text.leadership.item1.title: A partner who understands the technology and the politics.
text.leadership.item1.copy: Not just what the system does, but what approving it says, who it affects, and what it will be judged against in twelve months.
text.leadership.item2.title: Preparation for the difficult conversations.
text.leadership.item2.copy: The board presentation. The investment committee. The team that has been asked to absorb another change. Corbelle helps you walk in knowing exactly what you’re going to say, and ready for what comes back.
text.leadership.item3.title: A generational perspective built into the work.
text.leadership.item3.copy: Active MSc research on generational dynamics means Corbelle brings an evidence-based perspective on the friction inside organisations navigating an AI mandate.
text.leadership.item4.title: Continuity through implementation.
text.leadership.item4.copy: The decision doesn’t end when the meeting does. Corbelle stays present through the period where original intent most often gets lost.
text.leadership.fit1.label: Right fit
text.leadership.fit1.copy: CXOs, MDs, and VPs at PE-backed or owner-managed businesses who are personally responsible for technology decisions with huge career implications.
text.leadership.fit2.label: Not for
text.leadership.fit2.copy: Executives looking for coaching or leadership development programmes, or leaders who want to validate decisions already made.
